description.zh: Grouping info. Can be column name in data (if transpose=False), or list/Series matching samples (if transpose=True).
description.en: Grouping info. Can be column name in data (if transpose=False), or list/Series matching samples (if transpose=True).

description.zh: Column to use as index (e.g. Gene ID).
description.en: Column to use as index (e.g. Gene ID).

description.zh: Whether to transpose dataframe. Usually expression matrix is Gene x Sample. PCA needs Sample x Gene. So defaults to True.
description.en: Whether to transpose dataframe. Usually expression matrix is Gene x Sample. PCA needs Sample x Gene. So defaults to True.

description.zh: If True, draw confidence ellipses around groups defined by hue.
description.en: If True, draw confidence ellipses around groups defined by hue.

description.zh: Deprecated/Ignored. Ellipses are drawn based on 'hue' grouping.
description.en: Deprecated/Ignored. Ellipses are drawn based on 'hue' grouping.
